name: Banana Loaf
recipeIngredient: ¼ cup finely chopped dried apricots
recipeInstructions:
1. Warm ingredients to room temperature.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease bread pan.
3. Prepare ingredients: Grate lemon rind and set aside. Mash bananas (you should have 1½ cups). Finely dice the apricots and nutmeats, if used. Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt. Set aside.
4. Blend shortening (or butter), sugar, and lemon rind until creamy. Beat in eggs and banana pulp.
5. Add sifted ingredients to the sugar mixture with mixer on slow speed. Increase speed to medium and beat batter until smooth. Fold in apricots and nutmeats.
6. Scrape batter into pan. Bake about 1 hour or until done (a toothpick inserted in center should come out clean). Turn out on a rack and cool before slicing.
